# Meridian

> Meridian is a fictional neutral demo brand used to showcase a complete, bilingual (ES/EN) Brand Guidelines template. Tagline: "Aligned by design."

This file gives AI tools the brand context needed to create on-brand content. Keep it consistent with the full guidelines.

## Strategic foundation
- Purpose (the why, timeless): We exist so any team can create with the consistency of a great brand.
- Vision (the where): Be the reference point that aligns brand, product, and communication.
- Mission (the what, today): Help every team create with clarity and confidence.
- Values (the how): Clarity, Rigor, Warmth.
- Positioning: For fast-growing teams, Meridian is the brand system that keeps everything aligned — from strategy to the last application.

## Voice and tone
- Voice (constant): clear, confident, human.
- Be direct, not simplistic; assured, not arrogant; warm, not overly casual.
- Tone flexes with the reader's context and emotional state.
- Avoid jargon and hype. Use short sentences, second person, plain words.

## Style
- Sentence case for titles and UI.
- Active voice. Numbers zero–nine in words, 10+ as numerals.
- No ALL CAPS; use weight to emphasize.

## Visual identity
- Primary color: Cobalt #2348E0. Ink #0E1116. Surface (Mist) #EEF1F5.
- Display typeface: Space Grotesk. Body: Inter. Mono: Space Mono.
- Logo: wordmark + circular "meridian" symbol. Never stretch, recolor, rotate, or add effects.

## Resources
- Design tokens (W3C): meridian.tokens.json
- Tailwind preset: meridian.tailwind.js
- Brand voice system prompt: meridian-voice.md
- Color reference: meridian-colors.json
